examples: The dark feature pointing towards the lower left corner is the shadow of the pylon holding the occulter.
The Pole House in Fairhaven, Australia, is constructed on a concrete platform supported by a 13m-high pylon.
A PYLON is supposed to be a beautiful thing.
Soaking up its Georgia locale, Pylon pounded out dance music that dripped with Southern sweat.
Anti-pylon campaigner John Foster said he was "disappointed" with the route and said it should all be underground.
